nexonClubID (atlas writes character name into this slot)

GW_CharacterStat::nHP (v83 int16, v95 widened to int32)
world status (2 bytes; v83 reads as 2 × Decode1, atlas writes WriteShort — wire-equivalent)

mode (16/21/22; consumed by OnPacket dispatcher then SetTrunkDlg)

PER-TAB count byte; repeated once per set tab bit (4/8/16/32/64 = i=1..5), each followed by count*GW_ItemSlotBase::Decode
mode (9/13/15/19; consumed by OnPacket dispatcher then SetGetItems)
tab-flag bitmask (8 bytes via DecodeBuffer; v21)
meso (*(this+63); ONLY if flag&2 — runtime callers never set bit 2)

trailing addMov byte ONLY if invType==1 && (oldSlot<0||newSlot<0)
(equip path) cash/serial; addMov byte if invType==1 && slot<0
per-entry action switch (0/1/2/3) repeated count times
trailing addMov byte ONLY if any entry set nCurItemPos
message (chat text). NOTE: v83 has NO leading update_time (v95-only addition)
itemCRC (CItemInfo::GetItemCRC) — present in v83 AND v95
itemCRC (CItemInfo::GetItemCRC) — present in v83 AND v95
per-entry character name; repeated count times (string[], NOT byte[])
IsZeroGoods int (zero-goods flag). NOTE: v83 has NO trailing byte oneADay (v95-only)
ask_SPW() int (v31). NOTE: v83 is a 4-byte int; v95 sends EncodeStr sSPW
ask_SPW() int (v31). NOTE: v83 is a 4-byte int; v95 sends EncodeStr sSPW
field A (*(this+1304)). NOTE: v83 leading is int; v95 sends EncodeStr sSPW here
recipient name (v33). NOTE: v83 has NO byte oneADay before name (v95-only)
ask_SPW() int (a2). NOTE: v83 is a 4-byte int; v95 sends EncodeStr sSPW
mode (0x58 LOAD_LOCKER_DONE; op-byte consumed by OnCashItemResult dispatcher)
55 * count bytes (per GW_CashItemInfo = CashInventoryItem.EncodeBytes, 55 bytes each)
characterId — read before dispatching to OnAttack/OnHit/OnMove/etc.
nActionSpeed (unconditional in v83 — no nAction <= 0x110 guard)
monsterId per damage target (loop nDamagePerMob times)
damage count (only if meso explosion skill 4211006, per target)
damage value per hit (loop nHits times, or damage-count for meso explosion)

mobId for power guard (only if v20 != 0)
stance source (only if mob found for power guard)
power guard hit x (only if mob found)
power guard hit y (only if mob found)
v4: stance action (always, after power guard block, if nAttackIdx > -2)
nMasterLevel (per entry, for skills needing master level)
nChangedStatPoint (only present when IsMovementAffectingStat(mask) is true)

characterId — read by CUserPool::OnUserRemotePacket before dispatch (foreign path); absent on self-effect opcode

characterId — read by CUserPool::OnUserRemotePacket before dispatch
v4 flags byte: bit0=avatarLook, bit1=speed, bit2=carryItem
AvatarLook::Decode — full avatar look data (guard: v4 & 1)
liCoupleItemSN (8 bytes) + liPairItemSN (8 bytes) + dwPairCharacterId (4 bytes)
liFriendshipItemSN (8 bytes) + liFriendshipPairItemSN (8 bytes) + dwFriendCharacterId (4 bytes)
v7 (pet count; if >0: SetMultiPetInfo reads pets in bool-terminated loop)
chair list count (ZArray<long>::_Alloc + DecodeBuffer with 4 * count bytes)
sitting flag (0=cancel sit / stand up, 1=sit in chair)
result code (0=success; error codes: 6=system error, 9=unknown, 10=too many connections, 18=?, 20=secondary pin mismatch, 22=guild master, 24=engaged, 26=account transfer, 29=has family)

mode/sub-op byte (0=drop pick-up, 1=quest record, 2=cash item expire, 3=inc EXP, 4=inc SP/POP, 5=inc meso, 6=inc GP, 7=give buff, 8=general item expire, 9=system message, 0xA=quest record ex, 0xB=item protect expire, 0xC=item expire replace, 0xD=skill expire; v83 has 14 modes, v95 added mode 14=skill expire as 0xE)
characterId — consumed by CUserPool::OnUserCommonPacket dispatcher (case 0xBA) before calling this function
bEnchantSkill (true = Vega/enchant scroll category; false = normal scroll)
v5 (lucky/white-scroll display flag) — NOTE: v83 does NOT read nEnchantCategory(4 bytes) or nEnchantResultFlag(1 byte) that v95 added

FUNCKEY_MAPPED::nType (key type byte; loop 89 entries in v83 vs 90 in v95, only if resetToDefault==0)
FUNCKEY_MAPPED::nID (key action int32; loop 89 entries in v83, only if resetToDefault==0)

m_nPetConsumeMPItemID (MP auto-pot item ID; 0 = use config default)

crc (field CRC for anti-cheat; GMS>28 guard still applies in v83)
movement: CMovePath::Flush — encoded movement path; tool cannot linearize loop — ack:tool-limitation

CMob::GenerateMovePath.notes: Opcode 0xBC. v83 wire is the narrowest of the four audited versions — atlas's `(GMS && >83) || JMS` gates exclude the multiTargetForBall/randTimeForAreaAttack count+loop blocks, the hackedCodeCRC field between flyCtxTargetY and the Flush body, and the post-Flush bChasing tail. Decompile cross-check: COutPacket(0xBC) → Encode4 mobId, Encode2 ctrlSN+1, Encode1 packed flags, Encode1 actionType, Encode4 skill m_Data (packed), Encode1 state, Encode4 hackedCode, Encode4 flyCtxTargetX, Encode4 flyCtxTargetY, CMovePath::Flush, end.

calls.comment: flags byte (atlas dwFlag — multiBitFlag with nMoveType / bRiseByToss / etc.)
ti (TARGETINFO — atlas skillData packed; v83 lacks the multiTargetForBall + randTimeForAreaAttack blocks that v87/v95/JMS-v185 carry between actionType and state byte)
flyCtxTargetX (or 16768460 default when not in dev-mode)
CMovePath::Flush body (Movement elements). v83 lacks the post-Flush bChasing/hasTarget/bChasing2/bChasingHack/tChaseDuration tail that v87+ carry.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult.note: v83 OnMemoResult dispatcher. Mode byte consumed by dispatcher; mode=3 (DISPLAY) reads count+items. Wire shape identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#Display.note: mode=3 (DISPLAY). Reads item count then loops calling sub_4E4ADB per item. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#SendSuccess.note: mode=4 (SEND_SUCCESS). No extra fields; dispatcher reads mode byte then falls into string-pool notice. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#SendError.note: mode=5 (SEND_ERROR). errorCode selects string pool notice. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#Refresh.note: mode=8 (REFRESH). OnMemoNotify_Receive called, no further reads. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#ListUpdate.note: mode=7/0xA/0x12. Calls CWvsContext::CFriend::Reset which reads the full buddy list. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#Update.note: mode=8. UpdateFriend reads characterId+channelId+mapId. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#Invite.note: mode=9 (INVITE). v83 wire: Decode4(characterId) + DecodeStr(name) + sub_A40028(friendList,packet). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#ChannelChang.note: mode=0x14. Reads characterId + channelId + mapId. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#CapacityUpda.note: mode=0x15. Reads buddyListCapacity byte. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#Error.note: mode=0xB/0xC/0xD/0xE/0xF. No extra fields beyond mode. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Created.note: mode=8 (CREATED). v83: Decode4(partyId) + Decode4(memberId) + Decode4(mapId) + Decode2(jobId) + Decode2(level) + memset(3732,0,0x12A=298). Self-creation path, no PARTYDATA::Decode called externally.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Invite.note: mode=4 (INVITE). v83 wire: Decode4(partyId) + DecodeStr(inviterName) + Decode1(autoJoin). NO inviterJobId/inviterLevel — those were added in v95. Atlas Invite previously wrote mode+partyId+name+jobId+level+autoJoin; fix gates jobId/level behind v95+.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Disband.note: mode=12/Left with forcedByte=0. v83: Decode4(partyId) + Decode4(targetId) + Decode1(forced) [branch 0=disband] + PARTYDATA::Decode(298). Wire shape identical to v95 except PARTYDATA size.

calls.comment: PARTYDATA portals[6] × 4 ints (v83: no m_nSKillID, no PQ fields)

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Error.note: mode=9/10/13/16/17/19/21/22/23/25/28/29/30/32/33/35/36. Error codes — no further reads or trivial string decode. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#ChangeLeader.note: mode=27 (CHANGE_LEADER). v83: Decode4(newLeaderId) + Decode1(disconnected). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Join.note: mode=15. v83: Decode4(partyId) + DecodeStr(joinedName) + PARTYDATA::Decode(298). Wire shape identical to v95 except PARTYDATA size (298 vs 378).

calls.comment: PARTYDATA portals[6] × 4 ints (v83 no skillId, no PQ)

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Left.note: mode=12. v83: Decode4(partyId)+Decode4(targetId)+Decode1(forced)+DecodeStr(targetName)+PARTYDATA::Decode(298). Forced branch reads PARTYDATA. Wire shape identical to v95 except PARTYDATA size.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Update.note: mode=7/34. v83: Decode4(partyId)+PARTYDATA::Decode(0x12A=298 bytes). Confirmed via qmemcpy(v111,&szCookie[3732],0x12A). PARTYDATA in v83 has 4-int portals (no m_nSKillID) and no PQ fields. v95 extended to 0x17A=378.

calls.comment: PARTYDATA portals[6] × 4 ints: townId+fieldId+ptX+ptY (v83 no m_nSKillID, no PQ arrays)

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#OperationBody.note: mode=35 (member HP update index). v83: Decode4(memberId)+Decode4(hp)+Decode4(maxHp). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#InviteReject.note: mode=21/22/23 (invite reject variants). v83: DecodeStr(targetName). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult.note: v83 OnGuildResult dispatcher. Mode byte consumed; social invite case (mode=5) confirmed: Decode4(guildId)+DecodeStr(inviterName) only — no unknown/skillId fields. Those were added in v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#RequestAgreem.note: mode=3. v83: Decode4(partyId)+DecodeStr(leaderName)+DecodeStr(guildName). Wire identical to v95.

calls.comment: partyId (v6==0 path: from CWvsContext party field)

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#Invite.note: mode=5 (INVITE). v83 wire: Decode4(guildId) + DecodeStr(inviterName). NO unknown/skillId — those were added in v95. Fix gates both fields behind v95+.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#ErrorMessage.note: mode=0x1F+n (error-only modes). No extra reads. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#ErrorMessageW.note: mode=0x35/0x36/0x37 (invite rejected/busy/denied). v83: DecodeStr(targetName). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#CapacityChang.note: mode=0x3A. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode1(capacity). Wire identical to v95. Fix in v95 audit: capacity is byte (Decode1), not int (Decode4).

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#MemberJoined.note: mode=0x27. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode4(characterId)+sub_4E4445(member struct 0x24 bytes)+1 byte online. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#MemberLeft.note: mode=0x2C. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode4(characterId)+DecodeStr(name). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#MemberExpel.note: mode=0x2F. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode4(characterId)+DecodeStr(name). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#MemberStatusU.note: mode=0x3D. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode4(characterId)+Decode1(online). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#MemberTitleUp.note: mode=0x40. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode4(characterId)+Decode1(title). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#TitleChange.note: mode=0x3E. v83: Decode4(guildId)+5×DecodeStr(titles). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#EmblemChange.note: mode=0x42. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode2(logoBackground)+Decode1(bgColor)+Decode2(logo)+Decode1(logoColor). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#NoticeChange.note: mode=0x44. v83: Decode4(guildId)+DecodeStr(notice). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#Info.note: mode=0x1E (v4-1=30, v5=29, v6=27 → v40=0 branch). Calls sub_4E4553 to read full GUILDDATA. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#AgreementResp.note: mode=0x03 RequestAgreement path (v4==3). v83: Decode4(partyId)+DecodeStr(leaderName)+DecodeStr(guildName). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildBBSPacket.note: v83 OnGuildBBSPacket is a 0x16-byte thunk — too small to decompile. Delegates to an inner handler. v83 guild BBS functions (BBSThreadList, BBSThread) appear to exist as inner sub-functions called from this thunk. Serverbound BBS functions (SendLoadListRequest, SendViewEntryRequest, OnCommentDelete etc.) are absent as standalone named functions in v83.

CUIGuildBBS::OnGuildBBSPacket#BBSThreadL.note: v83 BBSThreadList sub-handler. Address is the outer thunk; inner function not separately named. Wire assumed identical to v95 (same packet format). Audit cannot confirm without decompiling inner function.

CUIGuildBBS::OnGuildBBSPacket#BBSThread.note: v83 BBSThread sub-handler. Address is the outer thunk; inner function not separately named. Wire assumed identical to v95. Audit cannot confirm without decompiling inner function.

CUIGuildBBS::SendLoadListRequest.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function — not found in binary. Likely inlined or handled differently in v83. Cannot audit.

CUIGuildBBS::SendViewEntryRequest.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function. Cannot audit.

CUIGuildBBS::OnCommentDelete.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function. Cannot audit.

CUIGuildBBS::OnRegister.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function. Cannot audit.

CUIGuildBBS::OnComment.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function. Cannot audit.

CUIGuildBBS::OnDelete.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function. Cannot audit.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#Add.note: mode=0 (OnEnter). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#Join.note: mode=1 (OnSelfEnterResult). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#Remove.note: mode=2 (OnLeave). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#RequestInvite.note: mode=3 (OnInvite). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#InviteSent.note: mode=4 (OnInviteResult). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#InviteDeclined.note: mode=5 (OnBlocked). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#Chat.note: mode=6 (OnChat). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#Update.note: mode=7 (OnAvatar). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95. Note: v83 OnPacket also has mode=8 (OnMigrated) absent from v95.

CUIMessenger::OnCreate.note: Client sends op=0+messengerId when accepting invite. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnDestroy.note: Client sends op=2 when closing window. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::SendInviteMsg.note: Client sends op=5+fromName+myName when declining. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::ProcessChat.note: Client sends messenger chat op=6+text. Wire identical to v95.

CField::SendChatMsg.note: v83 SendChatMsg@0x52c315. Confirmed: EncodeStr(text)+Encode1(balloon) only. NO updateTime field (absent in v83; present in v87+ via >83 gate already correct in atlas). Wire identical to what atlas already gates correctly.

calls.comment: x (target position X; only when portal name present)
y (target position Y; only when portal name present)
m_nChannelID (channel id) — v83 has NO DecodeOpt before it and NO m_dwOldDriverID after it
timestamp (DecodeBuffer p,8u FILETIME) — v83 has NO logout-gift block before it
m_nChannelID (channel id) — v83 NO DecodeOpt, NO m_dwOldDriverID
nHP — v83 reads Decode2 (2 bytes), v95 reads Decode4 (v20)
overrideAppear flag (v4; checked v4==1 in AppearShip case)
nType (mist type; ==3 is item-area-buff branch, v95.m_Data)
rcArea RECT (16 bytes = ltX,ltY,rbX,rbY as 4x int32, v86)
bAnimation (leave animation type; 0=play despawn animation, v3)
message (only when itemId!=0 && blowType==0; start path)
flag1 (EventTimerClock enable byte; representative arm = case 3)
